title: hieracium breconense
intro: Hieracium breconense, also known as Brecon yellow hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium breconense include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and provide antimicrobial protection. Herbal preparations of Hieracium breconense can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote skin health and well-being.
